themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "How do we experience God as 'covering' and 'refuge' amid present trials?". Word-study detail reinforces "וּלְמִסְתּ֔וֹר: and for a covert - a refuge".
